leadText: Moomoo Cheese (Japanese: モーモーチーズ Moomoo Cheese) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Melted cheese can really give a curry some richness.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh $ 2,200 $ 1,100 Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Melted cheese can really give a curry some richness. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh East Lake Axewell ( Camping King ) Hammerlocke Hills , Fields of Honor ( Ingredients Seller ) Poké Job reward (Tiers VII-IX) Sw Sh IA Master Dojo refrigerator (after donating 100,000 W )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] As its name suggests, it may be made from Moomoo Milk .
